pages.title: Module 3 — Data Integrity & Audit Standards
pages.subtitle: 21 CFR Part 11 / MedDRA / CTCAE v5.0
pages.body: Every record is cryptographically hashed at point of capture. IRB-ready audit trail. Zero PHI stored. No manual curation required before statistical analysis.
